a-i-agent-kaia: A.I Agent kAia (KAIA) is a cryptocurrency project focused on AI-driven automation and digital agent utilities. The token is used inside its ecosystem for access to features, transactions, and participation in future platform functions.
gains-network: Gains Network (GNS) is a decentralized trading platform that provides leveraged trading through its gTrade ecosystem. The GNS token is used for governance, rewards, and platform utility such as staking and fee-related mechanisms.
